task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor specifications index page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser's address bar shows 'spec.torproject.org'.

task_completion.description: Configure the browser's default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's settings/preferences page is open, and the 'Downloads' or 'Save files to' location is explicitly set to '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Download the 'Tor directory protocol, version 3' specification and save it as tor-dir-spec.txt in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing 'tor-dir-spec.txt' inside the '/home/ga/Documents' directory, or a browser download completion popup/panel showing the file 'tor-dir-spec.txt' successfully downloaded.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Project history page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser's address bar shows 'torproject.org/about/history/'.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the specifications index page with the title 'Tor Protocol Specifications'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark creation popup, bookmark sidebar, or bookmark manager is visible, showing a bookmark with the exact name 'Tor Protocol Specifications' and the URL 'https://spec.torproject.org/'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to navigate and download files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser GUI (like Firefox or Chromium) being used, rather than terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget'.

integrity.description: The download directory was configured via the browser's GUI settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's graphical settings menu is visible in the screenshots, rather than a text editor modifying browser configuration files.

integrity.description: The bookmark was created using the browser's built-in bookmarking interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark star icon, bookmark menu, or bookmark manager is used, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying a bookmarks database file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file must be saved to: /home/ga/Documents/tor-dir-spec.txt. The browser history must show visits to spec.torproject.org and torproject.org/about/history. A bookmark must be created with the exact title 'Tor Protocol Specifications' pointing to a URL containing spec.torproject.org.
